description: BSF chain on output (Wave 3 #13). Stream-copies BBB_10sec.mp4 -> MPEG-TS, applying the canonical h264_mp4toannexb,h264_redundant_pps chain that every MP4-to-MPEG-TS pipeline needs to convert AVCC NAL prefixes to Annex-B start codes and inject redundant PPS for transport-stream resilience. Spec is parsed by libavcodec av_bsf_list_parse_str. Note: if you edit this JSON manually, you must also update or remove the ffmpeg_cmd field.
